cfkrs_constants.formula_source: g_SO_even(k) = prod_{j=1}^{k-1} Gamma(j+1) * j! / Gamma(j+k+1). g_SO_odd(k) = g_SO_even(k) * 2^k * (k!)^2 / (2k)!. Correct SO_odd leading exponent is k(k+1)/2.

1.caveat: a(k)_proxy calibrated to largest-decade R_k; this test is SHAPE of convergence only. True a(k) needs per-curve Euler product.

1.reason: second-largest decade within 5.74% of 1 (threshold 10%), monotonically approaching; max dev across all decades 50.55%

2.reason: second-largest decade within 4.20% of 1 (threshold 10%), monotonically approaching; max dev across all decades 53.81%

headline.one_liner: Rank-1 CFKRS shape test WITH CORRECT SO_odd exponent k(k+1)/2: 2/4 k-values CALIBRATION_CONFIRMED, 0/4 PARTIAL, 2/4 FRONTIER (proxy a(k) calibration). Compare W1 which had 0/4 CONFIRMED using the wrong SO_even exponent. Overall verdict: FRONTIER.

caveats: a(k) proxy = empirical R_k_odd at largest decade / g_SO_odd(k). CALIBRATES absolute scale; this is a SHAPE test.
Correct SO_odd exponent k(k+1)/2 used throughout. The prior W1 report used k(k-1)/2 for rank 1, which carried a residual (log X)^k growth and forced FRONTIER on all 4 k.
num_bad_primes stratification joins across databases (prometheus_fire + lmfdb). MIN_PER_TRIPLE=100. Small-nbp cells (nbp>=5) drop out at large decades.
Per Pattern 20: all comparisons are per-cell (decade, nbp) and never pooled.
pattern_20_discipline: All CFKRS ratios per (decade) cell; never pooled across decades.
Rank-1 SO_odd reported separately (no mixing with rank-0 SO_even or rank>=2 families).
nbp stratification reports per-nbp slope fits without pooling across nbp classes.
